model_policy.spark_policy: Spark agents may support exploration or bounded verification only; they may not own PRs.

worktree_policy.owner_rule: Each PR-owning worker uses one git worktree and one branch.

default_review_checklist: Read exact V1/repasses source refs and cite code-level parity evidence.
Preserve good V1 UI/UX close to 1:1; document intentional improvements.
Use V2 backend contracts for data, permissions, entitlements, audit, and side effects.
Keep screen files free of local components/types unless tracked as an exception.
Use design tokens and shared components; no hardcoded component colors.
Run focused tests plus npm run validate, or document an accepted blocker.
Run qa:visual when required and attach report path.
Post GitHub review findings until there are zero unresolved findings.
Reviewer may post exactly Ready for Merge! only after all findings are resolved.

ignored_sources.reason: Old per-tenant admin login is replaced by V2 Clerk/local auth contracts.

slices.name: Frontend Migration Control Plane

backend_contract.notes: No product runtime contract change; adds orchestration, validation, prompt, and QA tooling.

visual.command: npm run migration:check-plan && npm run migration:inventory -- --check

slices.name: App Shell And Dashboard

backend_contract.notes: Dashboard reads the V2 GET /api/v1/analytics/dashboard contract, which enforces analytics.read, analytics entitlement, tenant/store scope, logs, and audit. V1 dashboard remains UI parity evidence only.

slices.name: Inventory List, Filters, And Catalog Management

backend_contract.notes: Use listing/unit split, catalog endpoints, store-scoped permissions, and workflow-status edit rules.

v1_improvement_backport_candidates: Check if V1 default inventory filter and seller locked-field behavior should be backported when parity gaps are found.

slices.name: Inventory Create, Edit, Media, And Public Readiness

backend_contract.notes: Use V2 listing/unit/media APIs, R2 upload descriptors, per-field permissions, and no V1 Prisma route assumptions.

slices.name: Reserve, Sell, Test Drive, And Vehicle Workflow Documents

backend_contract.notes: Workflow side effects are V2 canonical: sale/reserve services emit audit, documents, and finance entries.

blockers: Needs orchestrator review because it touches sale/reserve financial and document side effects.

v1_improvement_backport_candidates: If the V2 comparison finds live V1 sale-wizard defects, spawn a separate V1 hotfix thread.

slices.name: Leads List, Kanban, Tasks, And Pipeline Activity

backend_contract.notes: V2 owns leads and activity history; repasses ids are transitional external refs only.

slices.name: CRM WhatsApp Inbox, Session Detail, And Message Continuity

backend_contract.notes: No iframe or bridge auth; V2 terms call repasses backend through ACL for WhatsApp/team workflow continuity.

blockers: Complex chat/SSE interactions may need runtime-smoke evidence beyond Obscura.

v1_improvement_backport_candidates: Backport only critical live CRM refresh/state bugs found during source parity.
Check ChatArea/ChatInput media send type drift and ChannelMessageCounts raw fetch auth/baseURL behavior if V1 remains live.

slices.name: CRM Team, Tags, Settings, Connections, And Integrations

backend_contract.notes: Use V2 role/membership model for users and scoped CRM ACL for channel integrations.

slices.name: CRM Campaigns, MiniBot, Visits, Scheduling, And Financing Status

backend_contract.notes: Keep automation/channel behavior scoped by V2 store context and repasses ACL.

slices.name: Finance Expenses, Bills, Recurring Entries, And Receipts

backend_contract.notes: Use finance_entries, recurrence, document upload descriptors, and target ownership checks.

slices.name: Seller Commissions And Payables

backend_contract.notes: Use V2 commission rules and finance entry pay semantics; do not copy V1 pay-route assumptions blindly.

slices.name: Documents Center, Templates, Versions, Preview, And Download

backend_contract.notes: Use shared document domain, private R2 storage, authorized signed downloads, and immutable versions.

slices.name: Store Settings, Identity, Roles, And Permission Overrides

backend_contract.notes: Use role templates, overrides, entitlements, permission audit, and store settings service.

blockers: Permission changes require orchestrator review.

slices.name: Public Storefront, Customization, Domain, SEO, And Lead Capture

backend_contract.notes: Use published public settings, slug-only public listing lookup, DNS constraints, and V2-owned public lead capture.

v1_improvement_backport_candidates: Backport only data-loss fixes around customization persistence if rediscovered.

slices.name: Unified Reports, Drill-Downs, And PDF Export

backend_contract.notes: Use V2 analytics dashboard endpoints and truthful drill-down contracts; do not reintroduce brittle raw SQL assumptions.

v1_improvement_backport_candidates: If V1 report counts or PDF export regressions are rediscovered, spawn a separate V1 hotfix thread.

slices.name: Fiscal NF-e/NFS-e, Service Recipients, Issue, Cancel, And Sync

backend_contract.notes: Use V2 SPEDY gateway config, fail-closed fiscal service, audit, and exact NF-e/NFS-e code semantics.

blockers: Provider path/payload behavior must remain config-driven until certified.

slices.name: Billing, Plans, Add-ons, Agency Allocation, And Entitlements

backend_contract.notes: Billing controls entitlements; current Asaas runtime exposes readiness, not payment mutation actions.

blockers: Billing or entitlement mutation requires orchestrator review.

slices.name: Marketplace Provider Accounts, Sync Jobs, And Integration Overview

backend_contract.notes: Use encrypted provider credentials, OAuth/connect URL, scoped sync jobs, entitlements, and provider gateways.

blockers: Provider credentials and OAuth flows require redaction and config review.

slices.name: External API Clients, Keys, Docs, And Idempotent Actions

backend_contract.notes: Use scoped API keys, one-time secret display, rate limits, idempotency, and external API auth context.

blockers: API key handling requires secret-redaction review.

slices.name: Compliance And Internal Health Dashboards

backend_contract.notes: Use static compliance controls and audit DB-backed internal health where configured.

slices.name: Vehicle Checklists

backend_contract.notes: Placeholder until checklist workflow gets a V2 domain contract.

blockers: Deferred until P0/P1 operator workflows are stable.

slices.name: Sales And Financing Simulations

backend_contract.notes: Deferred until financing/simulation provider boundaries are approved.

blockers: Deferred until provider and business contract are explicit.

slices.name: Automatic Finance Entries

backend_contract.notes: Deferred until automatic-entry rules are defined against V2 finance workflows.

blockers: Deferred; needs finance workflow invariant review.

slices.name: Notifications And Push Preferences

backend_contract.notes: Deferred until V2 notification provider and device/user scope are approved.

blockers: Deferred until notification runtime plan is approved.

slices.name: Paid Traffic, Meta Pixel, Marketing, And Social Media Tools

backend_contract.notes: Deferred; do not port campaign tools until tracking, consent, and V2 lead attribution contracts are explicit.

blockers: Deferred; marketing attribution and consent plan required.

slices.name: Autobot And Seller AI Agent

backend_contract.notes: Deferred until AI operation ownership, audit, and CRM handoff policy are approved.

blockers: Deferred until AI agent operational policy is explicit.

slices.name: Tutorials And Help Content

backend_contract.notes: Do not block core migration on help/tutorial content.

blockers: Deferred.

slices.name: Customers Contact Workspace

backend_contract.notes: Placeholder only; design customer model after V2 lead identity stabilizes.

blockers: Deferred until CRM/customer boundaries are explicit.

slices.name: Domain Management Runtime Surface

backend_contract.notes: Domain settings are covered inside public-site/settings first; standalone surface is deferred.

blockers: Deferred; currently folded into public-site/settings.

slices.name: Repasses Buyer-Facing Marketplace And Experimental Chat Surfaces

backend_contract.notes: V2 is store-operated OS. Buyer marketplace/web-chat experiments do not port unless a later product decision reclassifies them.

blockers: Classified do-not-port.

slices.name: Repasses Auth, Profile, Register, And Admin Surfaces

backend_contract.notes: Do not port bridge auth, standalone repasses registration, or old admin profile flow. Use V2 Clerk/store membership contracts.

blockers: Classified do-not-port.

slices.name: Seller Dashboard, Broadcast, And Lightweight Inventory Workspace

backend_contract.notes: Deferred until V2 role-specific seller workspace requirements are explicit.

blockers: Deferred until seller-specific V2 workspace is designed.

slices.name: V1 Auth, Onboarding, Store Chooser, And Agency Signup

backend_contract.notes: Deferred because V2 local/dev currently bypasses UI auth and production Clerk flow needs separate product approval.

blockers: Requires orchestrator decision on production auth/onboarding scope.

slices.name: Agency Console, Store Creation, Team Access, And Unified Billing

backend_contract.notes: Deferred unless first tenant wave includes agencies; must use V2 tenants/stores and agency billing allocation.

blockers: Requires agency pilot decision.

slices.name: V1 Corporate Marketing, Blog, Comparison, And Legal Pages

backend_contract.notes: Corporate acquisition/content site is outside the V2 store-operator OS migration unless separately approved.

blockers: Classified do-not-port for this migration loop.

slices.name: V1 Consumer Car-Buying Campaign Funnel

backend_contract.notes: Consumer acquisition funnel is not part of first V2 dealership OS migration.

blockers: Classified do-not-port for this migration loop.

slices.name: V1 Internal Ops And Developer Log Screens

backend_contract.notes: Internal V1 admin/dev surfaces are not customer-facing V2 store OS screens.

blockers: Classified do-not-port for this migration loop.
